faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What can I build? Do I need to code?
faq.a1: You can build AI assistants that interact with databases, read web pages, process images, and more. While some familiarity with coding helps, our pre-built MCP tools mean you do not need to write the integration logic yourself.
faq.q2: What's included in the free plan?
faq.a2: The free plan gives you 50 AI requests per day, access to 10 MCP tools, a basic dashboard, and community support. It is a good way to explore the platform before moving to a paid plan.
faq.a3: Each time you use a tool, such as generating an image, reviewing code, or asking a question, it counts as one AI request. Your daily limit resets at midnight UTC and unused requests do not carry over.
faq.q4: Can I bring my own API keys?
faq.a4: Yes. Pro and Business plans include the API key vault (BYOK). You can add your own OpenAI, Anthropic, or other provider keys and have them used automatically.
faq.a5: The platform currently offers 250+ MCP tools for code generation, image processing, data analysis, browser automation, and more. Free users can access 10 core tools, while Pro and Business users get the full catalog.
faq.q6: How does the marketplace revenue share work?
faq.a6: Business subscribers who publish tools or integrations to the spike.land marketplace receive a percentage of the revenue generated by those tools. The commercial terms are covered during sign-up.
faq.q7: What happens when I hit my daily limit?
faq.a7: When you reach your daily AI request limit, new requests are queued and processed at a reduced rate instead of being blocked entirely. Limits reset at midnight UTC each day.
faq.a8: Yes. If you are not satisfied within the first 14 days of a paid plan, contact us for a full refund. After that, you can cancel at any time and keep access until the end of the billing period.
faq.a9: Yes. You can cancel your subscription at any time from the billing settings page. Your plan remains active until the end of the current billing period, after which you move back to the free tier.
